question_html:
Correct the verb errors in the following passage and rewrite it.

The tech startup, including its remote teams, face difficulties in maintaining workflow continuity. One of the main problems are that the software tools fails to integrate properly. The IT department doesn’t respond quickly to tickets. Productivity has dropped by 15% since the last quarter, and management begin reassessing project deadlines. Neither the CEO nor the managers was available for comment. The situation requires immediate action.
solution_html:
The tech startup, including its remote teams, faces difficulties in maintaining workflow continuity. One of the main problems is that the software tools fail to integrate properly. The IT department doesn’t respond quickly to tickets. Productivity has dropped by 15% since the last quarter, and management has begun reassessing project deadlines. Neither the CEO nor the managers were available for comment. The situation requires immediate action.

Marks Distribution:

(0.5× 5) = 2.5 marks for correcting the verbs.

question_html:
Fill in the gaps with appropriate words:

World Environment Day, observed on June 5, is a global event aimed at raising (a) _____ about environmental issues. Every year, a different theme is chosen to (b) _____ focus on pressing concerns like pollution, deforestation, or climate change. Governments, schools, and NGOs organize programs to (c) _____ public participation in green initiatives. Citizens engage in activities such as planting trees, cleaning drives, and (d) _____ awareness campaigns. The day serves as a reminder of our (e) _____ to protect and preserve the planet.
solution_html:
(a) awareness / consciousness / concern / understanding

(b) emphasize / highlight / promote / draw / direct / sharpen

(c) encourage / foster / motivate / increase / engage / stimulate / facilitate

(d) conducting / fostering / motivating / supporting / creating / organizing / running / launching

(e) responsibility / duty / obligation / commitment / pledge

Marks Distribution:

(0.5× 5) = 2.5 marks for filling the gaps with appropriate words.

question_html: Write a Paragraph on ‘Unlocking the Benefits of Space Exploration’.
solution_html:
Unlocking the Benefits of Space Exploration

Space exploration has always captured human imagination, pushing the boundaries of what we know about the universe and our place within it. Beyond the thrill of discovery, space exploration has brought tangible benefits to humanity. Technologies developed for space missions have found everyday applications, such as satellite communication that enables global connectivity and GPS systems that revolutionize navigation. Scientific research conducted in space helps us understand Earth’s climate, weather patterns, and natural disasters more clearly, improving our ability to respond and adapt. Moreover, exploring other planets fuels innovation, inspires new generations of scientists and engineers, and encourages international cooperation. As we continue to explore the cosmos, the knowledge gained can lead to solutions for critical challenges like resource scarcity and environmental sustainability. In essence, space exploration is not only about reaching stars but also about improving life on our planet and securing a better future for generations ahead.

Marks distribution:

0.5 mark for writing the title “Unlocking the Benefits of Space Exploration”

1.5 marks for writing about “Space Exploration”

1.5 marks for writing about relevant innovations and uses in real life.

1.5 marks for writing about benefits & future possibilities of space exploration.

Instructions:

* Students must write it within one single para. If it becomes more than one para, 50% marks must be deducted from the deserved marks.

* Students must write it within the 100 word-limit. For exceeding the 100 words limit, 0.5 marks have to be deducted from the deserved marks.

* 0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two spelling mistakes and 01 mark for three or more spelling mistakes.
